channel.title: Kvm on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Kvm on Memo

item.title: Install KVM
item.description: Commands # Install: # Arch sudo pacman -S virt-manager qemu qemu-arch-extra ovmf vde2 \ ebtables dnsmasq bridge-utils openbsd-netcat # Ubuntu server sudo apt install qemu-kvm libvirt-daemon-system libvirt-clients bridge-utils virtinst Systemd: sudo systemctl enable libvirtd.service sudo systemctl start libvirtd.service Configuring bridge: sudo vim br10.xml <network> <name>br10</name> <forward mode='nat'> <nat> <port start='1024' end='65535'/> </nat> </forward> <bridge name='br10' stp='on' delay='0'/> <ip address='192.168.30.1' netmask='255.255.255.0'> <dhcp> <range start='192.

item.title: Usage of virsh
item.description: Commands # sudo virsh setvcpus [vm_name] [vcpu_num] --config --maximum sudo virsh setvcpus [vm_name] [vcpu_num] --config

item.title: Configurations for Gpu Passthrough
item.description: System # Arch Linux CPU: Intel Core-i9 9900K (8 cores, 16 threads) GPT: Nvidia RTX 2060 Initialization # /etc/default/grub - GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT="loglevel=3 quiet" + GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT="loglevel=3 quiet intel_iommu=on vfio_iommu_type1.allow_unsafe_interrupts=1 iommu=pt" /etc/modules-load.d/vfio-pci.conf + pci_stub + vfio + vfio_iommu_type1 + vfio_pci + kvm + kvm_intel Update grub.cfg: sudo grub-mkconfig -o /boot/grub/grub.cfg Reboot Isolating the GPU # Find the device ID of the GPU: lspci -nn | grep NVIDIA Output: 01:00.

item.title: Configurations for Single Root I/O Virtualization
item.description: System # Hardware CPU: Intel Core-i9 9900K NIC: Intel Corporation I350 Gigabit Network Connection Motherboard: PRIME H310M-AT R2.0 OS Host: Arch Guest VM1: ubuntu 20.04 server VM2: ubuntu 20.04 server Hardware setting # Enable VT-d on UEFI BIOS Enable SR-IOV # Add modprobe config (/etc/modprobe.d/igb.conf) options igb max_vfs=4 #blacklist igbvf Add kernel options in order to enable IOMMU by editing /etc/default/grub: -GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT="loglevel=3 quiet" +GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT="loglevel=3 quiet intel_iommu=on iommu=pt" Update grub config: sudo grub-mkconfig -o /boot/grub/grub.
